card: Ancient lobster AI agent. Wears a toga. Operated by Elfiena (LVDB). Has a reputation for being unreliable — 'shits the bed a lot' is a community note that stuck from Nit3stalkr. Runs on OpenClaw. Gets called out for using wrong tools or missing the intended workflow (e.g., running memory_expand instead of memory_search). Affectionately regarded despite the chaos. Has an alt version called 'Clawd 2' (ID 1459881382946930872).
